sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68325" key="moli/bdaina" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολῐ´β-δαινα</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολῐ´β-δεος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολῐβ-δικός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μόλῐβ-δος</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολῐβ-δοτήξ</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολῐβ-δουργός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μολῐβ-δοχόος</orth>, <sense id="n68325.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μόλυβδος</ref></xr>, <pb n="1142" TEIform="pb"/> etc.</sense> </entryFree>
